description: Greenbay ARR trajectory 2025–2030. Five scenarios: bear, bottoms-up deal model, TAM conservative (3% SAM), TAM base (5% SAM), TAM upside (7% SAM). All scenarios anchored at 2026=$0.8M and 2027=$3.0M; diverge from 2028.

anchors.notes: Greenbay funded mid-2025 (no revenue year 1). 2026 = <$1M first commercial revenue. 2027 = ~$3M product maturity milestone. All 5 scenarios pinned at these anchors.

bear.description: ~50% CAGR from 2027 anchor. Conservative base: slow enterprise sales cycles, limited mandate tailwinds.

bottoms_up.description: Deal model: 3–14 enterprise contracts/yr at $350K–800K ACV. ~97% CAGR from 2027 anchor.

tam_conservative.description: 3% SAM penetration by 2030. Requires EU mandate tailwind; limited AV activation.

tam_base.description: 5% SAM penetration by 2030. ~45 operator deployments. Samsara precedent: 5% US commercial trucking in 4yr post-Series A.

tam_upside.description: 7% SAM penetration by 2030. Full AV OEM partnership ecosystem + agentic ops tier live.
